comments:
Kernel Composition and Dispatch Utilities

Provides functions for composing kernels, computing workgroup/dispatch
sizes, estimating costs, and transforming kernel pipelines.

declarations.comments:
Pipeline composition: sequence two kernels
Uses >>> internally for function chaining
declarations.title: andThen

declarations.comments:
Pipeline composition: apply transform then kernel
Uses <<< internally for function composition
declarations.title: applyTo

declarations.comments: Compose two kernel transforms (right to left)
declarations.title: composeTransforms

declarations.comments: Compose two kernel transforms (left to right)
declarations.title: pipeTransforms

declarations.comments: Compute workgroup size for text kernel
declarations.title: computeTextWorkgroupSize

declarations.comments: Compute dispatch size for text kernel
declarations.title: computeTextDispatchSize

declarations.comments:
Compare two kernels by estimated cost
Returns true if the first kernel is cheaper than the second
declarations.title: isKernelCheaper

declarations.comments:
Check if kernel cost is within acceptable bounds
Bounds are in microseconds
declarations.title: isKernelCostAcceptable

declarations.comments: Check if a kernel has zero cost (noop or empty sequence)
declarations.title: isZeroCostKernel

declarations.comments: Check if kernel exceeds a cost threshold (for budgeting)
declarations.title: exceedsCostBudget

declarations.comments: Select the cheaper of two kernels
declarations.title: cheaperKernel

declarations.comments:
Sort kernels by cost (returns indices)
Useful for scheduling optimization
declarations.title: kernelCostOrder

declarations.comments:
Map a transformation over all kernels in a sequence
For non-sequence kernels, applies the transform directly
declarations.title: mapKernels

declarations.comments: Validate workgroup size is reasonable (1-1024 per dimension)
declarations.title: isWorkgroupSizeValid

declarations.comments: Check if all kernels in a sequence meet a predicate
declarations.title: allKernelsSatisfy

declarations.comments: Check if any kernel in a sequence meets a predicate
declarations.title: anyKernelSatisfies

declarations.comments: Fold over kernel sequence with accumulator
declarations.title: foldKernels

declarations.comments: Right fold over kernels (builds structure from right)
declarations.title: foldrKernels

declarations.comments: Create inverted shadow effect (light from opposite direction)
declarations.title: invertShadowDirection

declarations.comments: Conditional kernel selection using otherwise pattern
declarations.title: selectKernel

name: Hydrogen.GPU.Kernel.Text.Composition
